---
title: "Correction"
---

## Research Question
Pre-processing & Corrections (预处理与影像校正)
What is the logical progression from Digital Numbers (DN) to Surface Reflectance (SR)?
Key Focus: DN → Radiance → Reflectance; removing sensor and atmospheric artifacts
.
When is "Absolute Atmospheric Correction" mandatory versus "Relative Correction"?
Key Focus: Mandatory for multi-temporal change detection and biophysical parameters (NDVI)
.
How does Orthorectification resolve geometric distortions caused by terrain and sensor angle?
Key Focus: Shifting pixels to their true map coordinates using a DEM.
What is the value of "Analysis Ready Data" (ARD) for policy-oriented researchers?
Key Focus: Reducing technical barriers by providing pre-corrected, standardized datasets
.
How does the Tasseled Cap Transformation reduce data dimensionality while preserving 97% of information?
Key Focus: Compressing bands into Brightness, Greenness, and Wetness components

## Application
